def countInterestingSubarrays(nums, modulo, k):
    # Prefix sum of counts of elements satisfying condition
    prefix = [0] * (len(nums) + 1)
    for i in range(len(nums)):
        prefix[i+1] = prefix[i] + (1 if nums[i] % modulo == k else 0)
    
    # Count interesting subarrays
    count = 0
    freq = {}
    freq[0] = 1  # For subarrays starting from index 0
    
    for i in range(len(nums)):
        # Current prefix count
        curr = prefix[i+1]
        # We need prefix[j] such that (curr - prefix[j]) % modulo == k
        # This means prefix[j] % modulo == (curr - k) % modulo
        target = (curr - k) % modulo
        count += freq.get(target, 0)
        
        # Update frequency of current prefix count
